text: A desk with various office supplies adjacent to a window.
A red fire hydrant sitting next to a barber shop sign.
A bathroom is partially modernized with the exception of a plastic looking toilet.
A close view of a banana tree with a bunch of bananas still attached.
A group of men playing frisbee in the park.
A brown and white sheep is standing in the grass.
A clock on a dock under a cloudy sky near the water
two cats drinking from a cup on a table
Some people are sitting on benches by a fountain.
A dog sniffs the air near a cup of coffee.
